name: 100,000 Calorie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, butter, and 1/3 cup evaporated milk.
2. Spread half of this mixture in a 13x9-inch pan.
3. Bake for 6 minutes at 350°F.
4. Sprinkle the chocolate chips and nuts on top of the baked mixture.
5. Melt caramels in milk.
6. Drizzle over the nuts and chocolate chips.
7. Pat remaining batter on top of this.
8. Bake for an additional 20 minutes.
